login.title: Pro login
login.subtitle: Access reserved for veterinarians and administrators.
login.brandTitle: Cardiac monitoring and client records in one tool
login.brandText: Welcome to petsFollow Pro — the workspace designed for animal care professionals, with a touch of good humour.
login.proOnly: Access reserved for Pro profiles (vet / admin)

twoFa.title: 2FA verification
twoFa.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

google.forbidden: Google access is reserved for Pro profiles.

register.title: Practice registration
register.subtitle: 100% free for veterinary professionals.
register.brandTitle: Join petsFollow Pro — free for veterinarians
register.brandText: Create your practice in minutes and start monitoring your cardiac patients today.

registerSent.brandText: We sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click it to activate your practice account.
registerSent.title: Email sent
registerSent.subtitle: A confirmation message was sent to {email}.
registerSent.instructions: Open the link in the email to confirm your registration, then sign in to set up your practice profile.

confirmEmail.brandConfirmedText: Your registration is confirmed. Discover petsFollow Pro and set up your practice.
confirmEmail.brandInvalidLink: This confirmation link is no longer valid.
confirmEmail.title: Registration confirmed
confirmEmail.expiredLink: This link has expired or was already used.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Practice profile, availability and automatic messages.
settings.autoReplyPlaceholder: Message sent automatically when you are unavailable.
settings.autoReplyDefault: I am unavailable and will get back to you shortly.

twoFa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twoFa.hint: Optional — adds a security layer via an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy…).
twoFa.scanHint: Scan the QR code or enter the secret:
twoFa.disableFailed: Could not disable — check the code and password

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the interface and message language.

heartrate.title: Heart rate reading
heartrate.subtitle: Measurement durations offered to your clients.

notifications.title: Email notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose which events trigger an email.

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Clients linked to your practice.
clients.emptyDescription: Clients will appear here once linked to your practice.

detail.title: Client profile
detail.subtitle: Pets and client record.
detail.petsEmptyDescription: This client has not registered any pets yet.

pet.title: Pet
pet.heartrateEmptyDescription: Validated BPM sessions will appear here.
pet.recentAlertBanner: The latest reading is flagged — clinical review recommended.
pet.timelineEmptyDescription: No monitoring events for this pet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your petsFollow Pro activity.
dashboard.aboutText: petsFollow Pro centralises cardiac monitoring, client records and secure messaging for your veterinary practice.

messages.title: Messaging
messages.subtitle: Secure exchanges with your clients.
messages.emptyDescription: Threads will appear when your clients message you.
messages.selectDescription: Choose a thread from the list to view messages.

onboarding.title: Practice setup
onboarding.subtitle: Complete your practice profile — visible to clients and editable anytime in settings.

welcome.title: Your cardiac practice, ready to go
welcome.lead: petsFollow Pro supports you daily: heart rate readings, alerts, messaging and patient records — all {free}.

profile.title: Set up your practice profile
profile.text: Enter phone, address and contact email on your first login.

invite.title: Invite your clients
invite.text: Clients sign up via the petsFollow mobile app and join you automatically.

monitor.title: Monitor heart rate readings
monitor.text: Receive BPM data, validate sessions and intervene when alerted.

communicate.title: Communicate with ease
communicate.text: Built-in messaging with configurable availability status.

bpm.title: BPM readings
bpm.text: Guided cardiac monitoring for dogs and cats.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.text: Immediate notification when an anomaly is detected.

welcome.ctaTitle: Next step: set up your practice profile
welcome.ctaText: On first login, enter your practice details so clients can reach you easily.

index.heroTitle: Cardiac monitoring for your patients, simplified
index.heroLead: petsFollow Pro centralises heart rate readings, client records and secure messaging in one tool built for veterinary practices.

heartrate.title: Guided heart rate readings
heartrate.text: Clients take BPM readings from the mobile app. You validate and track progress.

alerts.title: Smart alerts
alerts.text: Get notified immediately for tachycardia or detected anomalies.

messaging.title: Built-in messaging
messaging.text: Communicate with clients without leaving the platform. Configurable availability.

free.title: Free for vets
free.text: No practice subscription. petsFollow Pro is free for veterinary professionals.

security.title: Secure data
security.text: Compliant hosting, role-restricted access, encrypted messaging.

onboarding.title: Quick onboarding
onboarding.text: Register in 2 minutes, set up your practice profile on first access.

index.ctaText: The app is {free}. Your clients only pay for their pets' cardiac monitoring subscription.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.body: These terms govern the use of petsFollow Pro by veterinarians and the mobile app by pet owners. The app enables heart rate measurement, history review and communication with the practice.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: petsFollow processes personal data (name, email, readings, messages) to provide cardiac monitoring. Data is retained for the lifetime of the account. Contact support{'@'}petsfollow.test for GDPR requests.

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.body: Publisher: petsFollow. Contact: support{'@'}petsfollow.test. Hosting: GDPR-compliant cloud infrastructure.

errors.use_google_sign_in: This account uses Google — sign in with Google.
errors.google_pro_only: Google access reserved for Pro profiles.
errors.email_not_verified: Confirm your email before signing in.
errors.payment_required: Active subscription required for this pet
errors.email_already_exists: An account already exists with this email
errors.google_account_mismatch: This Google account is already linked to another user
